data.title: Avatar badge component + People directory layout

data.body:
## Design References

**Single badge design:**
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - avatar badge single.png

**Directory grid layout:**
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/home - avatar badge directory.png

## Badge Design (from reference)
- Tall vertical card with photo filling most of the card
- Light gray border/frame with small corner pin details (like a pinned photo)
- Person's name overlaid at the bottom of the photo in serif font
- Role/description text below the name, smaller, light text overlapping the photo bottom
- Subtle drop shadow on the card
- Pottermore/yearbook aesthetic

## Directory Layout (from reference)
- 3x3 grid (or responsive) of avatar badges on cream background
- Cards have consistent spacing between them
- Clean, gallery-like presentation
- Used for the People page (src/pages/PeoplePage.tsx)

## Data Source
People data lives in src/data/houses.ts — PEOPLE array with id, name, role, houses, handle, avatar fields. Avatar URLs are currently optional/empty — will need placeholder images or photos.
Merged into FRAC-40 — same scope (avatar badge component + faculty/people directory layout).
